surfaces.name: palette_status_ui
surfaces.evidence_ref: AriadnePalette.cpp (arx-only TU; #ifndef ARIADNE_NATIVE_CRX); ARIADNE_PALETTE command -> MFC-FREE acedAlert status surface. A docked CAdUiPaletteSet is the deliberate MFC-dependent enhancement (would change the module runtime/linkage; deferred to avoid destabilizing the build).

live_firing_verified.status: CLOSED -- live counts captured in BOTH headless and attended
live_firing_verified.mechanism: extend.deep_native.firing_selftest (overrule via acdbOpenObject, selmon via acedSSSetFirst) + inspect.deep_native.firing_report on a 2nd command (reactor commandWillStart). No acedCommand reentrancy.

palette_toolchain_note: MFC-free status skeleton shipped; docked CAdUiPaletteSet (MFC) deliberately deferred to keep the non-MFC ObjectARX build stable (packet: do not destabilize existing build)
